story:
Fermin and Tailah built a sheet-fort in the woods behind the schoolhouse. After Tailah accidentally tore a salamander’s leg, Fermin, upset, stormed off and got lost. The trees thickened, shadows sharpened, and panic took him. Leaf piles rose into figures wearing shawls of dead foliage and twig crowns, circling him on all sides as they pointed and moaned. He screamed Tailah’s name.

Years later—five since Fermin vanished—Tailah woke from the recurring nightmare, the fear now threaded with what felt like Fermin’s far-off voice. By her window, a strip of water-treated birch fluttered: Come to the woods.
implausible_knowledge: Leaf piles rose into figures wearing shawls of dead foliage and twig crowns, circling him on all sides as they pointed and moaned.
question: After finding the birch strip reading “Come to the woods,” what will Tailah most plausibly do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Seek out adults or police and bring others before approaching the woods.
answer_without_knowledge: Go alone to the woods, following the note in hopes of finding Fermin.
